explicit_text: I was on the ship preparing to sail when Pearl Harbor was bombed on December 7, 1941. When we arrived at Pearl Harbor, the destruction was horrific, with the Arizona sunk and hangars destroyed. It was a tense and unforgettable experience arriving there just before Christmas.

entity: The War of the Worlds (radio drama)

That broadcast had famously caused panic by simulating an alien invasion, so it was on my mind when the news broke. It was only after hearing the bombs and announcements that I realized Pearl Harbor was really under attack.
